title: Video Game Predicts 'campeão' for Fifth Time
description: Reports indicate a video game has correctly forecast the World Cup champion for the fifth consecutive time, following a history of accurate predictions.

sources.title: Jogo de videogame acerta previsão sobre campeão da Copa do Mundo pela quinta vez seguida
Empresa de game previu últimos 4 campeões da Copa. E pode acertar outra vez
Jogo de videogame acerta campeã da Copa do Mundo pela 5ª vez seguida

sections.heading: Recent Prediction
paragraphs: According to GE, a video game correctly predicted the champion of the World Cup for the fifth consecutive time. LANCE! similarly reported that the video game accurately forecast the champion for the 5th time in a row.

sections.heading: Track Record
paragraphs: UOL reported that a game company predicted the last four champions of the Copa do Mundo. The source noted that the company might get it right again.

sections.heading: Search Trends
paragraphs: The term "campeão" is trending in the BR region with a reported search lower bound of 50,000. Google Trends analyzes the popularity of search queries to identify trending topics.

faq.q: How many times has the video game predicted the winner?
faq.a: According to GE and LANCE!, the video game has correctly predicted the champion for the fifth consecutive time.

faq.q: What is the history of the game company's predictions?
faq.a: UOL reported that the game company predicted the last four champions of the Copa do Mundo.
